commitments.text: reduce emissions from F-gas emissions by 66% by 2030 compared with 2014 levels

measurability.reason: The commitment has a specific number, unit, target year, and baseline.

gap_findings.description: EU's NDC commitment of 66% methane reduction by 2030 is lower than the IPCC's recommended 34% reduction by 2030.
gap_findings.ndc_evidence: reduce emissions from F-gas emissions by 66% by 2030 compared with 2014 levels [NDC2_2020_EU, p.5]
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: reducing methane ~34% by 2030 vs 2020 buys near-term warming relief and is cost-effective [WG3_SPM_2022, p.42]

gap_findings.description: EU's NDC commitment does not specify the sectors that will be targeted for methane reduction.
gap_findings.ndc_evidence: reduce emissions from F-gas emissions by 66% by 2030 compared with 2014 levels [NDC2_2020_EU, p.5]
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: Specific commitments to reduce methane emissions from all sectors [WG3_Chapter04_MitigationDevelopmentPathways_2022, p.32]

details.summary: The EU's NDC commitment for methane reduction is lower than the IPCC's recommended target, and lacks specificity on targeted sectors.

pass_c.country_summary: The EU's NDC commitment for methane reduction is lower than the IPCC's recommended target, and lacks specificity on targeted sectors.
pass_c.policy_recommendation: The EU should revisit its NDC commitment and aim for a 34% methane reduction by 2030, targeting all sectors for reduction.
